heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 152511 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15251136:472., .Aug. 13, 1953, ch. 429, § 1267 Stat. 573
